prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年中国人民大学在海南省综合类最低录取位次分别为约102名、99名、102名、95名、178名。2021至2024年位次稳定在95–102名区间，2025年出现明显 后移，降至178名，较2024年下降约83名，降幅显著。近5年位次波动幅度较大，2025年为历史最低位次基准；该校在海南省综合类招生计划：2021年14人、2022 年14人、2023年13人、2024年13人、2025年12人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势。2026年招生计划为13人，较2025年增加1人，属小幅扩招，对竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国人民大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年位列第17名（Top20），近年排名稳定在17–19名区间，属于国内顶尖高校层次；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风相关事件，对报考心理可能产生一定降温作用；抖音热度排名第44位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；2025 年声誉评价为中性/混合，新闻传播学获评A++等级有正面影响。历史投档异常记录中未见人大在海南有明显断档信号；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科共15个， 包括法学A+、应用经济学A+、理论经济学A+、社会学A+、新闻传播学A+、统计学A+、工商管理A+、马克思主义理论A+、中国语言文学A+等，人文社科领域实力居全国顶尖水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 中国人民大学位于北京，属于一线城市顶尖高校，对全国考生吸引力强。该校在海南省招生计划占比较小（约12–14人 ），属于跨省招生，无特殊地域偏好；法学社会热度偏热（推荐），金融/财经/经济类分化观望，新闻传播学明显劝退，计算机类/人工智能推荐，统计学（数学/统计类）推荐。海南省考生总数 持续增长：2021年52977人→2025年67408人→2026年约78000人（增长约15.7%），竞争压力明显加大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的基准、2026年小幅扩招（12→13人）的缓解效应、海南省考生总数大幅增长（约+15.7%）带来 的竞争加剧、以及声誉偏负面的轻微降温作用，判断2026年最低录取位次将在2025年基准上略有前移。考生规模增长是推动位次前移的主要因素，扩招和声誉降温部分抵消了该影 响。预测最低位次约177名，区间157–197名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（157–197名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如157名以内），可重点冲刺法学、统计学类、 经济学类等一档王牌专业；若位次接近区间上限（197名左右），建议以二档金融学类、计算机类为核心，三档公共管理类为稳妥选择。中国人民大学人文社科实力全国顶尖，各 专业学科评估等级普遍为A类，报考价值极高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Renmin University of China in Hainan Province's comprehensive category were approximately 102, 99, 102, 95, and 178 respectively. Rankings remained stable in the 95–102 range from 2021 to 2024, but in 2025 there was a significant backward shift to 178, a drop of about 83 places compared to 2024, a notable decline. The ranking fluctuation over the past 5 years has been large, with 2025 being the lowest historical baseline. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan's comprehensive category: 14 in 2021, 14 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction trend. The 2026 enrollment plan is 13, an increase of 1 compared to 2025, a small expansion that slightly eases competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Renmin University of China is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 17th (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 17–19 range in recent years, placing it among the top domestic universities. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly related to teacher ethics incidents, which may have a slight cooling effect on application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was neutral/mixed, with Journalism and Communication receiving an A++ rating having a positive impact. There are no obvious signs of a significant drop in admission for Renmin University in Hainan in historical admission anomaly records. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 15 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Law, A+ in Applied Economics, A+ in Theoretical Economics, A+ in Sociology, A+ in Journalism and Communication, A+ in Statistics, A+ in Business Administration, A+ in Marxist Theory, A+ in Chinese Language and Literature, etc., with humanities and social sciences ranking at the top nationally.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, a top-tier university in a first-tier city, strongly attractive to candidates nationwide. Its enrollment plan in Hainan Province is relatively small (about 12–14 people), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment with no special regional preference. Law is socially hot (recommended), Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics are divided and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Computer Science/Artificial Intelligence is recommended, and Statistics (Mathematics/Statistics) is recommended. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province continues to grow: 52,977 in 2021 → 67,408 in 2025 → about 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7%), significantly increasing competition pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline of the significant ranking drop in 2025, the slight easing effect of the small expansion in 2026 (12→13), the intensified competition due to the large increase in Hainan candidates (about +15.7%), and the slight cooling effect of the negative reputation, it is judged that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move forward compared to the 2025 baseline. The growth in candidate numbers is the main factor driving the ranking forward, while the expansion and reputation cooling partially offset this effect. The predicted minimum ranking is about 177, with a range of 157–197.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (157–197), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 157), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Law, Statistics, and Economics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 197), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors like Finance and Computer Science, with Tier 3 majors like Public Administration as a safe choice. Renmin University of China has top-tier humanities and social sciences strength nationally, with most disciplines rated A-class in discipline evaluations, offering extremely high application value.
